description: Computes the next required action based on what's already done.
Creates a new engagement folder with the canonical sub-structure.
MEDDIC framework. GO requires named champion. NO-GO requires rationale. Recommendation thresholds in customize.toml.
Three sizing options (Small/Medium/Large) genuinely different in shape not just scale. 3+ assumptions. Top-5 risks. Trade-off named in recommendation.
Explicit cone of uncertainty by stage. Operating range never point. Transparent contingency. Red-team default-on.
Blank-page with optional firm-template basis. Reviewer notes per section mandatory. Refuses subjective acceptance criteria. Red-team default-on (strictest in framework).
The constitutional document for the engagement. Living document with append-only change-log; update intent appends a new revision row.
Responsibility matrix cross-checked against charter stakeholders.
Steering cadence escalation tree decision-rights matrix.
Who hears what how often in what channel.
First all-hands deck pulling from charter RACI governance comms.
Mermaid Gantt plus phase-summary table. Acceptance gate per milestone. Critical path named explicitly.
Matrix (canonical) plus rows (derived). Reconciliation enforced on every write.
Monthly view (T&M) plus milestone view (FP). Reconciliation between views is fatal-on-fail.
Append-only log. Two modes: pre-mortem (works solo) or red-team (attack a document). User picks at invocation.
Teams/Slack-paste-friendly status from charter RAID and decision-log. One file per ISO week.
Append modify or close risks assumptions issues dependencies. Sole writer of the RAID data tables.
Standup notes or transcript to action items blockers and decisions. Accepts paste or transcript file path.
Reports velocity at the precision of the input. Accepts CSV hand-fed numbers or qualitative narrative.
Structured 5-whys plus owner decision-needed escalation deadline. Writes deep-dive file and appends RAID Issues pointer row.
MARP deck + speaker notes in one file. Red-team default-on.
One page strict (~400 word target ~500 hard ceiling). Red-team default-on.
Per-role-archetype updates (CIO CFO COO CTO etc). One file per archetype. Red-team per file.
SCQA structure addressed to a single named decision-maker. Tone-check + red-team gates.
Forensic analysis of a single risk. Standalone document; offers to update RAID row mitigation cell with pointer.
Elicits granular (architectural/commercial/governance/external) and infers classic (scope/time/cost/quality/risk). Red-team default-on.
Each action requires owner action deadline trigger-to-revisit. Side-effect updates RAID row status to in-mitigation.
Decision-support memo. If recommendation is escalate hands off to Helena. If not appends to decision-log.
Dual view (summary table + narrative). 7 sub-dimensions. On-demand + 28-day default cadence. Source: paths or interview.
Dual view. 5 sub-dimensions (Test Mgmt Defects NFRs QA Metrics Automation). Same cadence and source rules as SDLC.
Dual view. 2 sub-dimensions (CI/CD with DORA metrics + Infrastructure Mgmt with IaC observability runbooks DR cost).
Dual view. 6 sub-dimensions + Compliance Regime Coverage cross-check (lax: warning only never auto-demotes RAG).
Dual cadence: weekly snapshot + monthly formal close. One file per period.
Dual view: per-period (monthly) + per-milestone (event-driven). User picks at invocation.
On-demand only. Commercial wrapper for an approved CR. Red-team default-on; signed COs trigger baseline update.
Four-model assessment (T&M/FP/Capacity/Outcome). Switch recommendations route through CR.
Backup pack only (audit-defensible evidence). Invoice itself goes via Finance system. Refuses FP without signed evidence.
Aggregate (5 dimensions: Morale Capacity Blockers Growth Dynamics). Confidential. 14-day default cadence. Refuses to name individuals.
Per-person 1-5 score + named contributing factors + required action. Single living document. Highly confidential.
Per-joiner ramp plan with phases milestones metrics buddy. Confidential.
Cumulative file per person; new entry prepended each time. Confidential.
Radical Candor + SBI structure. Highly confidential. Refuses general non-specific performance prep.
Strict operational core (10 items) + optional relational extensions (7 items). Refuses closed-state with unticked core.
Two sections in one file: internal (full honesty) + client-shareable (redacted). 4 format choices (LLLL / WW-WD / Sailboat / 5-Whys).
Dual-write: engagement-scoped file + per-lesson practice-library files at _pdf-output/practice/lessons-learned/. Only workflow that writes outside the engagement folder.
Both variants in one file: internal (canonical) + public (redacted commercial asset). Public variant red-team default-on.
12 sections inc. relationships personal context what-I-d-watch-for what-I-d-do-first things-I-d-rather-you-didn-t-change. Refuses operational-only for DM-replacement context.
Three modes (cynical/edge-case/acceptance). Per-artifact-type check sets in references/red-team-checks.md. Refuses pass with high-severity findings.
12 archetypes (9 audience-up + 3 peer-role). Substance integrity enforced — refuses to soften hard claims or lose claims.
Per-stage detail files + engagement-level index. Default immutable; reversals are new decisions. Refuses single-option decisions.
Background per-run JSONL records + user-invocable query mode. Prompt content hashed not stored. Confidentiality-respecting.
Walks gaps in any artifact via interview. Dispatches writes to the artifact's own workflow update intent — never writes directly.
